name: Dwarves
description: Fighters only, to the 6th level. In exchange: magic resistance adding four levels to saving throws (a 6th-level dwarf saves as a 10th-level human); sole full mastery of the +3 Magic War Hammer; the knack of noting slanting passages, traps, shifting walls, and new construction underground; and the tongues of Gnomes, Kobolds, and Goblins besides the usual.
